connectorUiConfig.title: Akamai Guardicore
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: The Akamai Guardicore connector uses the Codeless Connector Framework (CCF) to import Agents, Assets, Applications, and Policy Rules from a Guardicore Centra instance into Microsoft Sentinel via Data Collection Rule (DCR) ingestion. The connector polls every 10 minutes via Sentinel's CCF runtime; no Azure Function App is deployed.

dataTypes.name: GuardicoreApplications_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
GuardicoreApplications_CL
            | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
            | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: GuardicoreAssets_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
GuardicoreAssets_CL
            | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
            | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: GuardicoreAgents_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
GuardicoreAgents_CL
            | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
            | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: GuardicorePolicyRules_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
GuardicorePolicyRules_CL
            | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
            | where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and write permissions on the workspace are required.

instructionSteps.title: Connect Akamai Guardicore to Microsoft Sentinel
instructionSteps.description:
**Prerequisites**

1. You must have a reachable Akamai Guardicore Centra management instance with API access enabled.
2. Create (or obtain) an API user in Guardicore Centra with the **Read-only** role. This account must be authorized to call `/api/v3.0/authenticate`, `/api/v3.0/agents`, `/api/v3.0/assets`, `/api/v3.0/workflow/projects`, and `/api/v3.0/visibility/policy/rules`.
3. Have the Guardicore management URL (for example `https://<tenant>.cloud.guardicore.com`) and the service-account username and password ready.
4. The connector polls every 10 minutes via Sentinel's CCF runtime. No Azure Function App is deployed.

Provide your Guardicore Centra service-account details and click **Connect** to start polling.
